docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SUBPOENA ISSUED TO PATTI CAZZATO , CEO 583 SHOTWELL STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94110
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODNAR, TROY AS TO DEFENDANT STIRES, BRIAN
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BODNAR, TROY

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ((PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "APRIL 12, 2019, 2:58 PM NOTICE LEFT (NO AUTHORIZED RECIPIENT AVAILABLE) SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108" COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STIRES, BRIAN
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
RETURNED MAIL RECEIVED AFTER ENTRY OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION. ENDORSED COPY OF SC-100 MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE MARKED "UNCLAIMED."
